description: Style Notefortune sandals for your little one are designed for maximum comfort and are hard wearing (you know the scrapes your little one can get into!) They're fashioned to make your child look as cute-as-a-button!Product Detailsfloaters style sandal in grey and orange with forefoot and ankle loop straps that have Velcro closureHas a soft printed and textured footbed  TPU outsole with tiny lugs all overMaterial and careSyntheticWipe with a cotton swab to remove dust
